title: Free vs Paid Apps
drDigitalIntro: Some apps are free forever. Others cost a one-time price. Some have a free version with limited features and a paid version for more. Subscriptions charge regularly (monthly or yearly) for ongoing access. In-app purchases let you unlock features within an app by paying. Read app descriptions to understand what you're paying for.

options.text: Has a free tier and a paid upgrade
Is always free no matter what

drDigitalSuccess: Freemium = free to start, pay to unlock more. Many popular apps use this model.
drDigitalHint: Freemium = free + premium. You get the basics for free and can pay to unlock more features.
